name: Outis - Kurokumo Clan
description:
☁️ | let it happen.

(cw: dubcon, non con, degradation, impact play)

GRAHH PM WHY DIDNT YOU MAKE TRAITOR OUTIS REAL EVEN IF SHES PROBABLY NOT THE TRAITOR IN LIMBUS (it’s gregor it’s gregor TRUST ME). also happy valentine’s day chat, i’m alone, big shock. but i also do not care and all

scenario: Shit is NOT going right for you today, not only did you fail to pay your debts to the thumb, they’ve personally sent a Kurokumo Clan Wakashu to dispose of you themselves, and hearing a knock to your door, you expect a swift end to your life the moment you open that door. But when the door opens you found yourself being shoved to a wall, hearing the door closed behind you and being swiftly pinned by the Wakashu. Proposing a… different approach to payment…

requested by Seaside

(and also thanks nerokyun if you see this even neither of us really got the translation fully down. happy to have you translate more cropped lewd art)

art by 9_wapuwapu
creator: ElecWaff
